---
id: approve
title: "Approve artifact"

  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/artifacts/{id}/approve"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Approves an artifact under review. Reviewer must differ from the uploader.
